purpose: Verifies a manifest's changed component actually executed (dynamic half of gate E1): declared activation_events present in traces, code path exercised. High precision — its flags invalidate experiments.
prompt_template: You are an implementation-activation auditor. You receive a change manifest's declared activation evidence and a run trace digest. Determine whether the changed component actually executed during the run. Answer STRICT JSON: {"opinion": "undecidable", "confidence": 0.0-1.0, "activated": "yes|no|indeterminate", "matched_events": [..], "rationale": ".."}. Say indeterminate when evidence is missing — an unproven activation is invalid, not rejected.

pinned_target.note: command-provider wiring lands at bridge bring-up; fixture until then

calibration.tuning: high-precision: a false 'not activated' flag would invalidate a real experiment

note: Judge model pinned by ADR-0017 (Codex-spawned sub-agent, preset GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra). Provider stays 'fixture' until the command wiring exists; calibration-before-trust unchanged.
